From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Southern Asia (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=Southern_Asia_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "Southern Asia (disambiguation)"))

"**Southern Asia**" may refer to the following regions of the Asian continent:

* [Indian subcontinent](/wiki/Indian_subcontinent "Indian subcontinent"), a physiographical region south of the [Himalayas](/wiki/Himalayas "Himalayas") and bounded by the [Indo-Burman Ranges](/wiki/Indo-Burman_Ranges "Indo-Burman Ranges") to the east and the [Hindu Kush](/wiki/Hindu_Kush "Hindu Kush") to the west
* [South Asia](/wiki/South_Asia "South Asia"), a geopolitical region combining the Indian subcontinent with Afghanistan ([SAARC](/wiki/South_Asian_Association_for_Regional_Cooperation "South Asian Association for Regional Cooperation"))
* [Southern Asia (United Nations geoscheme)](/wiki/United_Nations_geoscheme#Southern_Asia "United Nations geoscheme"), a geographical subregion combining the Indian subcontinent with Afghanistan and Iran based on a [common linguistic relationship](/wiki/Indo-Iranian_languages "Indo-Iranian languages")

[![Disambiguation icon](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/5/5f/Disambig_gray.svg/40px-Disambig_gray.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Disambig_gray.svg)

Topics referred to by the same term

This [disambiguation](/wiki/Help:Disambiguation "Help:Disambiguation") page lists articles about distinct geographical locations with the same name.
